title: lastrea densiloba
intro: Lastrea densiloba, also known as the Slender Lady Fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to tropical forests in Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea densiloba include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the fronds of the Slender Lady Fern can be made into a decoction or infusion to be consumed as a tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
